artifact_warning: Manuscript-candidate package-native output; geometry/noise assumptions are closer to V24 but algorithm fidelity and final human signoff are still required before TAES submission.
assumptions: MIT Stata Center reference location with deterministic random UEs inside a 500 m disk.
Starlink-like synthetic LEO geometry with a 30 degree minimum elevation mask.
Clock-offset sweep uses nanosecond-valued time standard deviations converted to range-domain kilometers.
Refined JCLS uses a package-native dynamic SCI/SFI information update with x=theta, F=I, Pi=I, and Q=process_noise_std_km^2 I.
known_discrepancy_from_v24: Manuscript-candidate geometry/noise/algorithm path; synthetic satellite geometry and final human signoff remain unresolved.

rank_metadata.note: Rank fields named full_jcls_scenario_* are computed for the full gauged V24 theta and the scenario links used by the selected epoch count. They are not baseline-specific observability claims.
